ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "searchword" TEXT /* Search word used to find the article (e.g., EUREX) */,
  "api" TEXT /* API used to retrieve the article (e.g., Google API, Bing API) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the article */,
  "article_text" TEXT /* Full text of the article */,
  "title_sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the article title (e.g., positive, neutral, negative) */,
  "article_sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the article text (e.g., positive, neutral, negative) */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the article is verified or not */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the article (e.g., news website, blog, etc.) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the article (e.g., finance, business, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article that mentions the entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., company, organization, person, location, etc.) */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the entity (e.g., a score indicating how relevant the entity is to the article) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment entry */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "title_positive" REAL /* Positive sentiment score for the article title */,
  "title_neutral" REAL /* Neutral sentiment score for the article title */,
  "title_negative" REAL /* Negative sentiment score for the article title */,
  "article_positive" REAL /* Positive sentiment score for the article text */,
  "article_neutral" REAL /* Neutral sentiment score for the article text */,
  "article_negative" REAL /* Negative sentiment score for the article text */,
  "sentiment_analysis_method" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis method used (e.g., natural language processing, machine learning, etc.) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis (e.g., a score indicating how confident the model is in its sentiment prediction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the topic (e.g., finance, business, etc.) */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the topic (e.g., a score indicating how relevant the topic is to the article) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the revenue data */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue amount */,
  "revenue_type" TEXT /* Revenue type (e.g., quarterly, annual, etc.) */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the revenue (e.g., a percentage indicating the growth rate of the revenue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, etc.) */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Preferences of the user (e.g., notification settings, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Investment recommendation based on the article sentiment and market trends */,
  "recommendation_type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., buy, sell, hold, etc.) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation (e.g., a score indicating how confident the model is in its recommendation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_topics" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_relationships" (
  "entity_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first entity */,
  "entity_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second entity */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., subsidiary, partner, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id1", "entity_id2")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market trend data */,
  "stock_price" REAL /* Stock price */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, search, etc.) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
